summary: Increase INSERT_DEPTH from 4.0 mm to 5.0 mm so the insert pocket extends through the full TAB_H = 5 mm tab thickness.

scad_changes.description: Match insert pocket depth to new TAB_H so the hole goes fully through the tab.
scad_changes.search: INSERT_DEPTH =  4.0;  // insert pocket depth = TAB_H (fills full tab zone)
scad_changes.replace: INSERT_DEPTH =  5.0;  // insert pocket depth = TAB_H (fills full tab zone)
